title: A Herd of Goats Took Over an Entire Neighborhood
script: A whole herd of goats just took over a neighborhood, and nobody could stop them. Dozens of goats escaped a nearby farm overnight and wandered straight into a quiet suburb, munching front lawns, flowers, and hedges down to the dirt. Residents woke up to goats standing on their cars, blocking the road, and staring through windows. Animal control chased them for hours, but goats are fast, stubborn, and great at squeezing through fences. Some climbed retaining walls like it was nothing. By the time crews rounded most of them up, the street looked like a petting zoo had exploded. So how does a whole herd break out at once?
